section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne
sentence: At xOne, (accessible from https://xone.ai), one of our main priority is the privacy of our visitors. This Privacy Policy document contains types of information that is collected and recorded by xOne and how we use it.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne
sentence: If you have additional questions or require more information about our Privacy Policy, do not hesitate to contact us.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne
sentence: This Privacy Policy applies only to our online activities and is valid for visitors to our website with regards to the information that they shared and/or collect in xOne.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne
sentence: This policy is not applicable to any information collected offline or via channels other than this website.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:Consent
sentence: By using our website, you hereby consent to our Privacy Policy and agree to its terms.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:Information we collect
sentence: The personal information that you are asked to provide, and the reasons why you are asked to provide it, will be made clear to you at the point we ask you to provide your personal information.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:Information we collect
sentence: If you contact us directly, we may receive additional information about you such as your name, email address, phone number, the contents of the message and/or attachments you may send us, and any other information you may choose to provide.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:Information we collect
sentence: When you register for an account, we may ask for your contact information, including items such as name, company name, address, email address, and telephone number.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:How we use your information
sentence: We use the information we collect in various ways, including to: Provide, operate, and maintain our website

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:How we use your information
sentence: We use the information we collect in various ways, including to: Improve, personalize, and expand our website

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:How we use your information
sentence: We use the information we collect in various ways, including to: Understand and analyze how you use our website

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:How we use your information
sentence: We use the information we collect in various ways, including to: Develop new products, services, features, and functionality

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:How we use your information
sentence: We use the information we collect in various ways, including to: Communicate with you, either directly or through one of our partners, including for customer service, to provide you with updates and other information relating to the website, and for marketing and promotional purposes

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:How we use your information
sentence: We use the information we collect in various ways, including to: Send you emails

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:How we use your information
sentence: We use the information we collect in various ways, including to: Find and prevent fraud

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:Log Files
sentence: xOne follows a standard procedure of using log files. These files log visitors when they visit websites. All hosting companies do this as part of hosting services analytics. The information collected by log files include internet protocol (IP) addresses, browser type, Internet Service Provider (ISP), date and time stamp, referring/exit pages, and possibly the number of clicks.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:Log Files
sentence: These are not linked to any information that is personally identifiable. The purpose of the information is for analysing trends, administering the site, tracking users movement on the website, and gathering demographic information.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:Cookies and Web Beacons
sentence: Like any other website, xOne uses cookies. These cookies are used to store information including visitors preferences, and the pages on the website that the visitor accessed or visited. The information is used to optimize the users experience by customizing our web page content based on visitors browser type and/or other information.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:Advertising Partners Privacy Policies
sentence: You may consult this list to find the Privacy Policy for each of the advertising partners of xOne.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:Advertising Partners Privacy Policies
sentence: Third-party ad servers or ad networks uses technologies like cookies, JavaScript, or Web Beacons that are used in their respective advertisements and links that appear on xOne, which are sent directly to users browser. They automatically receive your IP address when this occurs. These technologies are used to measure the effectiveness of their advertising campaigns and/or to personalize the advertising content that you see on websites that you visit.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:Advertising Partners Privacy Policies
sentence: Note that xOne has no access to or control over these cookies that are used by third-party advertisers.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:Third Party Privacy Policies
sentence: xOnes Privacy Policy does not apply to other advertisers or websites. Thus, we are advising you to consult the respective Privacy Policies of these third-party ad servers for more detailed information. It may include their practices and instructions about how to opt-out of certain options.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:Third Party Privacy Policies
sentence: You can choose to disable cookies through your individual browser options. To know more detailed information about cookie management with specific web browsers, it can be found at the browsers respective websites.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:Privacy Rights (Do Not Sell My Personal Information)
sentence: Among other rights, Indian consumers have the right to:

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:Privacy Rights (Do Not Sell My Personal Information)
sentence: Request that a business that collects a consumers personal data disclose the categories and specific pieces of personal data that a business has collected about consumers.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:Privacy Rights (Do Not Sell My Personal Information)
sentence: Request that a business delete any personal data about the consumer that a business has collected.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:Privacy Rights (Do Not Sell My Personal Information)
sentence: Request that a business that sells a consumers personal data, not sell the consumers personal data.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:Privacy Rights (Do Not Sell My Personal Information)
sentence: If you make a request, we have one month to respond to you. If you would like to exercise any of these rights, please contact us.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:GDPR Data Protection Rights
sentence: We would like to make sure you are fully aware of all of your data protection rights. Every user is entitled to the following:

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:GDPR Data Protection Rights
sentence: The right to access - You have the right to request copies of your personal data. We may charge you a small fee for this service.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:GDPR Data Protection Rights
sentence: The right to rectification - You have the right to request that we correct any information you believe is inaccurate. You also have the right to request that we complete the information you believe is incomplete.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:GDPR Data Protection Rights
sentence: The right to erasure - You have the right to request that we erase your personal data, under certain conditions.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:GDPR Data Protection Rights
sentence: The right to restrict processing - You have the right to request that we restrict the processing of your personal data, under certain conditions.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:GDPR Data Protection Rights
sentence: The right to object to processing - You have the right to object to our processing of your personal data, under certain conditions.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:GDPR Data Protection Rights
sentence: The right to data portability - You have the right to request that we transfer the data that we have collected to another organization, or directly to you, under certain conditions.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:GDPR Data Protection Rights
sentence: If you make a request, we have one month to respond to you. If you would like to exercise any of these rights, please contact us.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:Childrens Information
sentence: Another part of our priority is adding protection for children while using the internet. We encourage parents and guardians to observe, participate in, and/or monitor and guide their online activity.

section: H1:Privacy Policy for xOne > H2:Childrens Information
sentence: xOne does not knowingly collect any Personal Identifiable Information from children under the age of 13. If you think that your child provided this kind of information on our website, we strongly encourage you to contact us immediately and we will do our best efforts to promptly remove such information from our records.
